name: Ganesh Kalal (MIEAust)
tagline: Civil & Structural Engineer | Major Infrastructure & Industrial Delivery
kicker: Melbourne VIC • Structural Design • QA Compliance • Project Delivery
heroTitle: Delivering complex civil, structural, and infrastructure works safely, compliantly, and on program.
heroSubtitle: Civil and Structural Engineer with 5+ years of experience delivering major infrastructure, telecom, and industrial projects across Tier-1 and Tier-2 environments. Specializing in structural design review, subcontractor management, tender evaluation, and rigorous QA supervision. Member of Engineers Australia, progressing toward the NER pathway.
signatureLine: Clear sequence. Strong controls. Clean QA. Deliver it right.
aboutLead: A professional portfolio of my engineering experience, presented simply and clearly.
aboutStory: I am a Melbourne-based Civil and Structural Engineer with a proven track record across diverse sectors—from metro rail and freeway upgrades to 5G telecom infrastructure and major industrial closures. I focus on structural integrity, meticulous planning, subcontractor coordination, and quality verification to deliver safe, compliant outcomes in complex, high-risk environments.
knownFor: Structural design and analysis for civil, telecom, and infrastructure assets
Technical review and compliance checks to Australian Standards (AS 3600, AS 4100, AS 1170)
Planning and sequencing of heavy civil and structural works
SOW and RFQ preparation, procurement, and tender evaluation
Site inspections, hold points, and rigorous QA conformance reporting
tools: Project & Reporting: MS Project, P6, Procore, Oracle NetSuite, MS Office
Design & Drafting: AutoCAD 2D, Civil 3D, 12d, Bluebeam, SketchUp
Structural Analysis: SpaceGass, Structural Toolkit, Microstran, MS Tower, RAPT
Standards: NCC, Australian Standards (AS1170.2, AS4100, AS3600), VicRoads

bento.title: How I run a site
bento.preview: Clear sequencing, controlled risks, disciplined engineering coordination, and clean close-out.
bento.fullText: I focus on engineering planning, structural sequencing, and daily control so delivery stays safe and predictable. I bridge the gap between design requirements and on-site execution, ensuring documentation is current and evidence is captured progressively.
bullets: Daily prestart and constraints check
Subcontractor coordination and structural sequencing
Temporary works and exclusion zone management
Progress reporting and MDR close-out evidence

bento.title: Procurement & Contracts
bento.preview: Scope clarity and rigorous technical evaluation to support project award and delivery control.
bento.fullText: I translate engineering designs into clear SOW and RFQ packages. I evaluate subcontractor submissions technically and commercially, support contract negotiations, and administer progress claims and variations.
bullets: SOW and RFQ package preparation
Technical and commercial tender evaluation
Progress claims verification
Variation tracking and EOT support

bento.title: QA & Compliance
bento.preview: Evidence-based QA that guarantees structural integrity and stands up during handover.
bento.fullText: Quality Assurance is the foundation of my civil work. I maintain strict ITPs, conduct structural inspections, track RFIs, and close out non-conformances (NCRs) progressively to ensure assets meet all Australian Standards.
bullets: ITP development and inspection checklists
Hold point verification and concrete QA testing
RFI and NCR resolution
Close-out packs and material traceability

projects.title: National 5G Telecom Upgrade
projects.preview: Led structural design coordination for 150+ tower upgrades and completed 100+ site inspections.
projects.fullText: Delivered design coordination, structural analysis, field inspections, and approvals support for critical telecom infrastructure across multiple council jurisdictions.
bullets: Structural design coordination for 150+ steel and lattice tower upgrades
Completed 100+ site inspections to confirm structural compliance and safety
Technical evaluation of subcontractor engineering proposals
Secured statutory planning approvals from 20+ councils

projects.title: West Gate Freeway Upgrade
projects.preview: Structural design support and construction oversight for RCC crash barriers and precast noise walls.
projects.fullText: Delivered structural design support and site supervision, ensuring works met stringent VicRoads standards and AS 5100 under live-traffic conditions.
bullets: Reviewed shop drawings and supervised concrete pours and panel installations
Conducted QA including concrete testing and reinforcement verification
Delivered civil works to VicRoads standards and AS 5100 requirements
Achieved zero non-conformances across 100+ structural installations

projects.title: Rio Tinto Gove Industrial Closure
projects.preview: Project Engineer overseeing heavy structural dismantling, remediation, and design compliance verification.
projects.fullText: Supporting the engineering delivery of Australia's largest industrial closure. Managed procurement documentation, structural design package reviews, and complex contractor coordination.
bullets: Prepared procurement documentation for heavy civil and dismantling packages
Reviewed structural design packages for AS 3600 and AS 4100 compliance
Managed contractor coordination and strict quality/safety verification
Supported progress claims across multiple specialized subcontractors

projects.title: ExxonMobil Refinery Decommissioning
projects.preview: Project Engineer managing subcontractor packages, on-site civil works, procurement, and structural planning.
projects.fullText: Engineering delivery support for complex refinery closure packages including procurement, design review, site supervision, and maintaining operations alongside live fuel import lines.
bullets: Prepared SOW/RFQ packages and evaluated 15+ tender submissions technically
Reviewed and approved contractor structural designs and technical queries
Negotiated and justified contract variations totaling $8M+
Coordinated statutory approvals with local authorities and councils
Planned sequencing and delivery of heavy civil and structural decommissioning on $100M+ industrial projects
Prepared SOW, RFQ, ITPs and managed technical queries, RFIs, and engineering coordination
Produced weekly progress reporting including cost, schedule, and risk; supported statutory approvals
Conducted site inspections, verified hold points, led safety audits, and supported budget variations
Delivered 150+ lattice tower and steel/timber pole upgrades including structural design, analysis, and fabrication coordination
Reviewed drawings and ITPs for AS/NZS 1170.2 and AS 4100 compliance; conducted extensive field inspections
Supported tender evaluation and provided technical input to contract negotiations
Supported statutory approvals across 20+ councils

timeline.roleCompany: Graduate Structural Engineer, Clive Steele Partners
bullets: Designed reinforced concrete elements to AS 3600 and prepared technical construction drawings
Reviewed subcontractor shop drawings and supervised on-site concrete works including quality testing
Coordinated council approvals and organized geotechnical surveys and DBYD searches
Conducted structural asset inspections and prepared rectification recommendations
